author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B (#985) value-parity attempt failed at strict loader's UnmappedFixtureKey check.

Verbatim panic: 'MobileNetV3-Small: loader failed on well-formed fixture: invalid argument: MobileNetV3-Small value-parity loader: torchvision key "features.8.block.3.0.weight" has no mapping to a ferrotorch parameter and is not a declared BN buffer'

Root cause: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/mobilenet.rs documents MobileNetV3-Small as omitting depthwise+pointwise, SE attention, h-swish, and BN. torchvision's mobilenet_v3_small has features.N.block.M.0/1 (Conv+BN groups including SE fc1/fc2), 142 params + 68 fp_buffers. Ferrotorch's MobileNetV3-Small has only Conv2d weights, no SE, no BN.

Phase 1B test infra in place; tests #[ignore = "#991 ..."] until ferrotorch impl gains the missing layers.
